title: Quit Smoking - Canada.ca
content:
## Tools for a smoke-free life
The best way to quit smoking is the one that works for you. Combining the right tools and support can improve your chances of quitting. Explore your options and make your plan.
- Real stories from people who have quit
- Make your quit plan and access supports
Make your own quit plan or call 1-866-366-3667 toll-free and talk to a quit coach.

## Make your quit plan and access supports
Plan how you’ll quit smoking to improve your chance of success.
Equip yourself with the knowledge and skills to quit smoking with confidence.
Free, convenient, and confidential. Access trained specialists today!

Help someone quit smoking

Additional resources
Self-help booklets, pamphlets and videos about quitting and preventing smoking.
